allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/Users/alber/Documents/DND/GM-Board/.audit-cache/races.json'\)\); humans=[r for r in d.get\('race',[]\) if 'Human' in r.get\('name',''\) and r.get\('source',''\)=='XPHB']; print\(json.dumps\(humans[:1], indent=2\)\)")

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $content = $wc.DownloadString\("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/5etools-mirror-3/5etools-src/main/data/class/class-fighter.json"\); $j = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.subclassFeature | Where-Object { $_.subclassSource -eq "FRHoF" } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10)

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $content = $wc.DownloadString\("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/5etools-mirror-3/5etools-src/main/data/sources.json"\); $j = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.book | Where-Object { $_.id -match "\(?i\)efa|fraif|frhof|eberron|artificer" } | Select-Object id,name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $content = $wc.DownloadString\("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/5etools-mirror-3/5etools-src/main/data/class/class-artificer.json"\); $j = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.subclass | Select-Object name,source,shortName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $content = $wc.DownloadString\("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/5etools-mirror-3/5etools-src/main/data/class/class-artificer.json"\); $j = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.subclassFeature | Where-Object { $_.source -eq "EFA" } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "=== $\($_.name\) lv$\($_.level\) ==="; $_.entries | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 })

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $content = $wc.DownloadString\("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/5etools-mirror-3/5etools-src/main/data/class/class-fighter.json"\); $j = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; \($j.subclass | Where-Object { $_.source -eq "FRHoF" }\).name; Write-Output "---"; $j.subclassFeature | Where-Object { $_.subclassSource -eq "FRHoF" -and $_.name -ne "Banneret" -and $_.name -ne "Knightly Envoy" -and $_.name -ne "Group Recovery" -and $_.name -ne "Team Tactics" -and $_.name -ne "Rallying Surge" -and $_.name -ne "Shared Resilience" -and $_.name -ne "Inspiring Commander" } | Select-Object name,level | Format-Table)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/5etools-mirror-3/5etools-src/main/data/generated/gendata-spell-source-lookup.json" -ErrorAction Stop; $keys = \($r | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty\).Name | Select-Object -First 3; Write-Output "OK - top keys: $keys" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/5etools-mirror-3/5etools-src/main/data/generated/gendata-spell-source-lookup.json"; $keys = \($r | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty\).Name; Write-Output "Sources in lookup: $\($keys -join ', '\)")
